---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem

<!-- What's the situation you'd like to solve? Describe the workflow,
     the pain point, or the limitation you've run into. -->

## Who is this for

<!-- Moimio is built for small-event organisers (churches, missions, retreats,
     up to ~300 participants). Is your request:
       - For all organisers?
       - For a specific kind of event you run?
       - For a specific role (event admin, staff, participant)?
     The more concrete, the easier it is to scope. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What you'd like Moimio to do. UI sketches, mockups, or simply
     a step-by-step description of the workflow are all welcome. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Any workarounds you've tried, or alternative approaches you considered?
     If you couldn't find a workaround, just say so. -->

## Out of scope (optional)

<!-- Sometimes a request is "and then it should also do X" where X opens
     a much bigger conversation. If you have a sense of what's NOT being
     asked for, noting it here helps keep the discussion focused. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Anything else — links to similar features in other tools, screenshots,
     references to related issues. -->
